subject: refactor(mobile): move Save + ThemeSelector into burger menu
body:
Cleaner mobile header — now just app name/badge + burger menu button.
Previously Save and ThemeSelector cluttered the header with 3 interactive
elements competing for space. Per glow-props standard menu items spec,
dark/light toggle belongs in the menu.

Changes:
- BurgerMenu: added separator, trailing, preventClose, and children support
- MobileLayout: Save is first menu item, dark mode toggle with visual switch,
  theme picker as expandable section at bottom of menu
- Header reduced to app name + single burger button

Tags: ui, mobile, menu, refactor
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: mobile-ux
Semver: minor
